input_description: user asks for the next concrete step on an already-bounded task
shadow_artifact_summary: ranked next-step suggestion with one-sentence rationale
promotion_condition: suggestion accepted or lightly edited across repeated interactions
failure_condition: suggestions repeatedly increase correction burden or latency

input_description: new mythic or naming material with possible architecture relevance but weak evidence maturity
shadow_artifact_summary: bounded archive note plus open questions for later pressure-testing
promotion_condition: concept proves useful on a real routing or interface surface
failure_condition: material remains purely aesthetic and cannot improve decisions

input_description: proposal to promote a draft into canonical or public-facing status
shadow_artifact_summary: promotion hold or candidate record with explicit reasons
promotion_condition: declared evidence threshold and falsification framing are satisfied
failure_condition: symbolic appeal substitutes for operational proof
notes: high-consequence surfaces must never skip trace emission
